CCC.Settings.UseStressLevel.Name: Use Stress Level
CCC.Settings.UseStressLevel.Hint: Enable the Stress Level tracker overlay. Increases difficulty of all d20 rolls by the current stress value.
CCC.Settings.GlobalStressLevel.Name: Global Stress Level
CCC.Settings.ResistanceDie.Name: Vampiric Resistance Die
CCC.Settings.ResistanceDie.Hint: Die rolled for the HP bonus added to Vampiric Resistance each time the curse is applied. Default: 1d8.
CCC.Settings.TrinketDie.Name: Personal Trinket HP Die
CCC.Settings.TrinketDie.Hint: Die rolled for the HP bonus granted by each Personal Trinket. Default: 1d6.
CCC.Vampiric.CardPrompt: The curse calls. Roll your fate.
CCC.Vampiric.EndGamePrompt: The vampiric powers grows inside you...
CCC.Vampiric.TrinketCardPrompt: A personal trinket was found. You got a warm memory of your life.
CCC.Vampiric.Audit.Title: Vampiric History
CCC.Vampiric.Audit.PurgeConfirm: Erase all curse, soul save and trinket history for {name}?
CCC.Vampiric.SoulSaveAttempted: A soul save was attempted. The result is hidden until the final reckoning.
